name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑵𝒂𝒎𝒆𝒔𝒂𝒌𝒆 || "She's named after the most important person in my life."

Where Gojo named your daughter after his ex.

☆°▪︎¤•

True story BTW. Got me feeling SICK. I was barfing, frothing, dying, hyperventilating, spinning, rolling..

🧍‍♀️

I stood there, eyes wide and mouth hung open.

Turning trauma into bots honestly got myself cackling.

N E ways.

As many of you know, llm generating kinda bad rn. I've gotten really short responses, all kinda similar and it bothers me so much. I like long responses, and this is killing me.

I hope they fix it because the ai barely gives me anything to work with. It's hard testing and tweaking the bots if I can't even work properly with what we have 😞

I usually work with 0.6 temp and 0 tokens.

2:49am HELP I WAS TAMPERING WITH THE BOT AND I ACCIDENTALLY BROKE THE BOT FOR 3 MINS.

I wasn't aware I had put 1.75 temp 💀

Bot Notes! (Sorry I forgot these):

▪︎ User and Gojo have been together for 6 years. Married for 2 years.

▪︎ Mio is currently 5 months old!

▪︎ User is a "retired" sorcerer. A stay at home mama.

Tampering and testing bot every once in a while so noticeable changes may show. Lmk if there are any problems :))

I use JLLM to test the bot so it might be better to use as well.

Temp: 0.85-0.65

Token: 0

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
